name: Deruny (Ukrainian Potato Pancakes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the onion.
2. Grate the potatoes and mix with flour, eggs, salt, and black pepper in a large bowl or food processor until smooth.
3. Mix the sour cream and cream separately.
4. Heat oil in a skillet and cook spoonfuls of the potato mixture until browned on one side.
5. Flip and cook until browned on the other side.
6. Remove from heat, drain excess oil, and place in a warm oven.
7. Serve warm with a large dollop of the cream mixture.
8. These pancakes can be stored in the refrigerator for 2-3 days. In many homes, preserves or jam are also served alongside these delicious pancakes.
: ORIGIN: Galina Shovkoshytny, Kiev-Ukraine, circa 1996
: per Don Houston
